text.headline: DMT Visual Phenomena Research Timeline
text.text: From Klüver's form constants to the 650 nm laser protocol — 100 years of research into geometric hallucinations and N,N-DMT visual effects

text.headline: Klüver Identifies Form Constants
text.text:
Heinrich Klüver describes four universal geometric patterns (tunnels, spirals, honeycombs, lattices) induced by mescaline. First systematic documentation of psychedelic visual hallucinations.

DOI: 10.1037/h0074964

text.headline: First DMT Human Studies
text.text:
Stephen Szára conducts first documented human N,N-DMT administration studies in Hungary. Reports intense visual hallucinations lasting 30-60 minutes.

DOI: 10.1007/BF00403735

text.headline: Endogenous DMT Discovery
text.text:
DMT confirmed as naturally occurring in human cerebrospinal fluid and blood. Raises questions about endogenous function in consciousness.

DOI: 10.1126/science.1257894

text.headline: Pineal Gland DMT Hypothesis
text.text:
Strassman proposes pineal gland as potential source of endogenous DMT production. Controversial 'spirit molecule' hypothesis emerges.

DOI: 10.1016/0306-4522(79)90104-5

text.headline: Ermentrout-Cowan V1 Model
text.text:
Mathematical model explains how visual cortex (V1) architecture generates geometric hallucinations. Predicts form constant patterns from neural connectivity.

DOI: 10.1007/BF00336965

text.headline: Strassman UNM DMT Study Begins
text.text:
Rick Strassman launches first U.S. human DMT research in 25 years at University of New Mexico. Studies 60 volunteers with IV DMT.

DOI: 10.1007/s002130050582

text.headline: DMT Rapid Memory Decay Observed
text.text:
Strassman documents extreme difficulty recalling visual details post-experience. Memory consolidation appears disrupted during DMT state.

DOI: 10.1007/s002130050582

text.headline: Strassman: Memory Decay Problem
text.text:
Strassman publishes 'DMT: The Spirit Molecule' documenting rapid forgetting of visual content. 'Like trying to remember a dream while waking.'

DOI: 10.1007/978-1-4615-0115-9

text.headline: Ayahuasca Legal Framework
text.text:
Religious use of ayahuasca (DMT-containing brew) protected under U.S. law for UDV and Santo Daime churches. Opens path for ceremonial research.

Supreme Court Opinion

text.headline: Imperial College Psychedelic Unit
text.text:
David Nutt, Amanda Feilding, and Robin Carhart-Harris establish psychedelic research program. First modern EEG studies of DMT begin planning.

DOI: 10.1177/0269881110379283

text.headline: DMT Extended-State Studies
text.text:
Andrew Gallimore proposes continuous IV infusion protocol to extend DMT state. Theoretical framework for sustained psychedelic research.

DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2015.00211

text.headline: First Modern DMT Neuroimaging
text.text:
Imperial College publishes first modern fMRI and EEG data during DMT experiences. Shows decreased alpha wave activity and default mode network disruption.

DOI: 10.1038/srep20233

text.headline: DMT Dialogues Conference
text.text:
First international conference dedicated to DMT research. Researchers, anthropologists, and experiencers gather to discuss phenomenology and neuroscience.

DMT Dialogues

text.headline: Timmermann EEG Breakthrough
text.text:
Chris Timmermann publishes landmark EEG study showing DMT increases brain entropy and disorganized neural activity. Contradicts simple 'hallucination' model.

DOI: 10.1038/s41598-019-51974-4

text.headline: Geometric Hallucination Topology
text.text:
Michael et al. publish mathematical model connecting V1 cortex architecture to form constants. Explains tunnels, spirals, but not alphabetic symbols.

DOI: 10.1098/rstb.2000.0769

text.headline: Davis: Phenomenology Survey
text.text:
Alan Davis publishes largest phenomenology survey (n=2,561) of DMT experiences. 65% report 'instructional' or 'communicative' emotional tone.

DOI: 10.1002/hup.2806

text.headline: Entity Encounter Meta-Analysis
text.text:
Structured analysis of 'entity encounters' during DMT. 80% report autonomous beings; 50% describe entities with communicative intent.

DOI: 10.1002/hup.2806

text.headline: Lawrence: Extended DMT Protocol
text.text:
DMT Extended State Trial (DMTx) achieves sustained 30+ minute experiences via continuous infusion. Allows detailed phenomenology mapping.

DOI: 10.3389/fpsyt.2022.842749

text.headline: VR Integration Experiments
text.text:
Researchers begin testing VR headsets during DMT states to provide external visual anchors. Mixed results with equipment discomfort.

DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2022.1021565

text.headline: Underground Laser Experiments Begin
text.text:
Independent researchers begin experimenting with handheld lasers as visual anchors during DMT experiences. Early reports describe 'symbols appearing on surfaces.'

Unpublished observations

text.headline: Diffraction Grating Optimization
text.text:
Danny Goler discovers diffraction grating caps enhance symbol clarity. Pattern dispersion creates stable surface for projection.

Personal communication

text.headline: 650nm Wavelength Isolation
text.text:
Systematic testing across wavelengths (405nm blue, 532nm green, 650nm red). Only 650nm red shows consistent alphabetic-like symbol morphology.

Goler pilot data

text.headline: Chase Hughes Validation
text.text:
Behavioral psychologist Chase Hughes independently replicates Goler protocol. Confirms symbol appearance with 650nm laser + diffraction grating.

Personal communication

text.headline: First Cross-Session Symbol Match
text.text:
Two independent participants report identical symbol morphology (angular 'N'-like glyph) during separate sessions. First evidence of potential reproducibility.

Unpublished observations

text.headline: Online Community Formation
text.text:
Reddit and Discord groups form around laser protocol experimentation. Self-reported success rate 70-90% with proper technique.

Community reports

text.headline: Goler Pilot Study
text.text:
Danny Goler completes pilot study (n=3,000+) showing 87% inter-subject consistency in reported symbol appearance. Alphabetic-like characters predominate.

Goler 2025 (IPI Letters)

text.headline: Morris Skepticism Published
text.text:
Neuroscientist Morris publishes methodological critique. Notes absence of control groups, blinding, placebo conditions. Calls for rigorous experimental validation.

Morris critique (unpublished)

text.headline: Optical Artifact Debate
text.text:
Researchers debate whether symbols are retinal phosphenes vs externally projected phenomena. Symbol appearance on diverse surfaces (walls, skin, closed eyes) complicates artifact hypothesis.

Ongoing research

text.headline: DMT Code Registry Launch
text.text:
dmtcode.com launches as open community-maintained catalogue of discrete visual symbols. Features canvas drawing tool, metadata tracking, confirmation voting.

dmtcode.com

text.headline: Null Report Tracking Begins
text.text:
Registry implements null report submission path. First systematic tracking of negative results (wavelength × surface conditions with no symbols). Selection bias mitigation.

Null Reports
